2026-02-26T22:13:16.6407244Z  
2026-02-26T22:13:16.6407419Z  ### InteractiveBrowserCredential
2026-02-26T22:13:16.6407646Z  
2026-02-26T22:13:16.6407899Z -The `InteractiveBrowserCredential` follows the [implicit grant
2026-02-26T22:13:16.6408540Z -flow](https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/active-directory/develop/v2-oauth2-implicit-grant-flow)
2026-02-26T22:13:16.6409136Z -which enables authentication for clients that run completely in the browser. It
2026-02-26T22:13:16.6409639Z -is primarily useful for single-page web applications (SPAs) which need to
2026-02-26T22:13:16.6410077Z -authenticate to access Azure resources and APIs directly.
2026-02-26T22:13:16.6410378Z -
2026-02-26T22:13:16.6410656Z -To use this credential successfully, your app registration will need to be
2026-02-26T22:13:16.6411162Z -configured with both the **Access tokens** and **ID tokens** options checked under
2026-02-26T22:13:16.6411599Z -**Implicit grant** in the **Authentication** page.
2026-02-26T22:13:16.6411873Z -
2026-02-26T22:13:16.6412146Z -You will also need to add a redirect URI in the **Redirect URIs** section of the
2026-02-26T22:13:16.6412620Z +The `InteractiveBrowserCredential` follows the [authorization code
2026-02-26T22:13:16.6413164Z +flow](https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/active-directory/develop/v2-oauth2-auth-code-flow)
2026-02-26T22:13:16.6413718Z +with [PKCE](https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc7636) which enables
2026-02-26T22:13:16.6414178Z +authentication for clients running in the browser or on Node.js. It
2026-02-26T22:13:16.6414792Z +is primarily useful for single-page web applications (SPAs) and desktop
2026-02-26T22:13:16.6415259Z +applications which need to authenticate to access Azure resources and APIs
2026-02-26T22:13:16.6415619Z +directly.
2026-02-26T22:13:16.6415779Z +
2026-02-26T22:13:16.6416052Z +On Node.js it opens a browser window and listens for a redirect response. On
2026-02-26T22:13:16.6416698Z +browsers it authenticates via a popup or redirect. For Node.js, the Microsoft
2026-02-26T22:13:16.6417201Z +Entra application should be configured with a "Mobile and desktop applications"
2026-02-26T22:13:16.6417588Z +redirect endpoint.
2026-02-26T22:13:16.6417764Z +
2026-02-26T22:13:16.6418027Z +You will need to add a redirect URI in the **Redirect URIs** section of the
2026-02-26T22:13:16.6418505Z  **Authentication** page for your app registration. The redirect URI must point
2026-02-26T22:13:16.6419072Z  to the URI of your web application. You must also make sure to specify the same
2026-02-26T22:13:16.6419573Z  URI in the `redirectUri` field of the `InteractiveBrowserCredentialOptions` when
2026-02-26T22:13:16.6419992Z  creating an `InteractiveBrowserCredential`.
2026-02-26T22:13:16.6420244Z  
2026-02-26T22:13:16.6420502Z -> NOTE: At this time, this credential can only be used in the browser but
2026-02-26T22:13:16.6421121Z -> Node.js support will be added in the future (see issue [#4774](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-js/issues/4774)).
2026-02-26T22:13:16.6421604Z -
2026-02-26T22:13:16.6421772Z  ### DeviceCodeCredential
2026-02-26T22:13:16.6421974Z  
2026-02-26T22:13:16.6422219Z  The `DeviceCodeCredential` follows the [device code authorization
2026-02-26T22:13:16.6422707Z @@ -314,7 +314,12 @@ which tries each of the following credential types in order until one of them
2026-02-26T22:13:16.6423117Z  succeeds:
2026-02-26T22:13:16.6423281Z  
2026-02-26T22:13:16.6423448Z  - `EnvironmentCredential`
2026-02-26T22:13:16.6423694Z +- `WorkloadIdentityCredential`
2026-02-26T22:13:16.6423938Z  - `ManagedIdentityCredential`
2026-02-26T22:13:16.6424180Z +- `VisualStudioCodeCredential`
2026-02-26T22:13:16.6424580Z +- `AzureCliCredential`
2026-02-26T22:13:16.6424799Z +- `AzurePowerShellCredential`
2026-02-26T22:13:16.6425037Z +- `AzureDeveloperCliCredential`
2026-02-26T22:13:16.6425256Z  
2026-02-26T22:13:16.6425543Z  This credential type is ideal when one of the credentials in the chain will work
2026-02-26T22:13:16.6426057Z  in the current environment, whether it's your local development or a production
2026-02-26T22:13:16.6426419Z --
